blended.narrative: Lookout Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 18 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,270 ft. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days.

recent_conditions.narrative: 16.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
